data.output:
# Story 16 Final — Run-detail permalink hardening (post-codex)

## Reframing per codex finding 1
Story 16 is **NOT a new product surface**. It is the permalink hardening of the `runs/[runId]` page that Story 8 already redirects to. Story 8 lands the list + inline expansion + redirect targets. Story 16 makes the **destination page lossless and shareable**. Anything beyond that is scope creep and gets dropped.

## Diagnosis (unchanged)
- Tool calls already captured at drain time (`agent_runner_service.go`, `ToolCallEntry`) and exposed via `ExecutionToolCallConnection`.
- `executions/[executionId]/+page.svelte` (358 lines) has Manifest/Prompt/Result/Session/Tools tabs — proven pattern, will be promoted into `lib/runDetail/` and reused.
- `Run` resolver exposes only `promptSummary`, `evidenceLinks`, `outcome`, `baseRevision`, `resultRevision`. **Lossy.**
- `AgentSession` already has full `prompt`, `response`, `stderr`, `tokens{...}`, `billingMode`. Tool calls live on `Execution`, not `AgentSession`.

## Relationship to Story 8 — SUBSET (sibling, sequenced after)
Story 8 sets the redirect target `/runs/[runId]?bundle=true` and inline expansion. Story 16 makes that destination URL render the lossless detail (full prompt/response/tool-call/evidence) so the redirect from `/executions/[id]` is not a regression. Without Story 16, Story 8 ships a regression because `/executions/[id]` (rich) collapses into `/runs/[runId]` (summary-only).

## Decisions recorded (per codex BLOCKs)

### Live vs post-hoc (codex 2)
**Recorded scope: completed-run audit + running-state linkage.** v1 does NOT include full live transcript replay, but the run-detail page MUST:
- Display run status (running / merged / preserved / failed) with last-update timestamp.
- For running runs, link to the originating worker page where existing `workerProgress` subscription already shows last-N events. No new subscription infra in this story.
- Plan explicitly states: "Story 16 is audit + supervision-link, not live replay." Live replay deferred to a later story.

### Tool-call persistence (codex 3)
**Persist normalized `ToolCallEntry` at drain time directly into the run-layer detail backing**, not by parsing logs at resolver time. Reuses existing drain code in `service_run.go`. Log parsing remains only as a one-off backfill migration. Resolver always reads from the persisted normalized store.

### Permission model (codex 4)
**Recorded rule, v1**: visibility of full prompt/response/tools/evidence on a run is gated by the same authorization that gates the parent project's artifact access. No new ACL surface. In coordinator+clients (Story 14), a coordinator that has artifact access to a remote client's project transitively has transcript access. Story 14 owns any future per-field ACL.

### Redaction (codex 5)
**Recorded policy, v1**: no redaction. Trust boundary = project membership. Documented in FEAT-008 with explicit threat-boundary statement: "Anyone with project read access sees raw prompts, responses, stderr, tool args. Operators must not store production secrets in repos consumed by DDx agents." Future redaction is a separate feature.

### Evidence browser (codex 6) — DROPPED to minimum viable
v1 evidence tab is **list + metadata + download + raw small-text inline view only**. No Markdown rendering, no syntax highlighting, no hex preview. Whitelist: `manifest.json`, `prompt.md`, `result.json`, `*.txt`, `*.md`, files <64KB. Anything else: download link only.

### Performance AC (codex 9) — DROPPED
Replaced with: lazy-load tabs (Tools and Evidence load on tab activation), pagination defaults (50 tool calls per page), and regression e2e tests at p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files) for "renders without crash, all tabs interactive within one render frame." No fake-precision millisecond budgets.

## Spec changes
- **FEAT-008**: add Run-detail-page subsection. Document the trust boundary statement (no redaction, project membership = transcript access). Document evidence browser whitelist.
- **FEAT-010**: extend Run resolver contract to include `prompt`, `response`, `stderr`, `toolCalls(first, after)`, `bundleFiles[]`, `bundleFile(path)` with bundle-root confinement. Document normalized `ToolCallEntry` is the canonical store, populated at drain.
- **FEAT-019**: review surface points to `/runs/[runId]` deep page.

## Implementation surface

### Backend (one bead, codex 7)
- Persist `ToolCallEntry` into AgentSession/Run detail backing at drain time (extend existing drain in `service_run.go` / `agent_runner_service.go`).
- Extend `Run` resolver: `prompt`, `response`, `stderr`, `toolCalls(first, after)`, `bundleFiles[]` (path, size, mimeType), `bundleFile(path) -> {content, truncated, sizeBytes}`.
- Bundle-root confinement: canonical-path check; reject anything outside `<projectRoot>/.ddx/executions/<runId>/`.
- Whitelist enforcement for inline content: only allowed extensions/sizes return `content`; everything else returns `truncated=true, sizeBytes=N` and a download URL.

### Frontend
- Promote shared subcomponents from `executions/[executionId]/+page.svelte` into `lib/runDetail/` (tab shell, prompt panel, response panel, tools panel, session panel).
- Rebuild `runs/[runId]/+page.svelte` as tabbed: **Overview / Prompt / Response / Tools / Evidence / Session**.
- Tab state in URL (`?tab=tools`); deep-link friendly.
- Overview: status, run/try/work layer chip, base/result rev, link to originating worker (for running state, codex 2).
- Evidence: list + metadata + download + inline view for whitelisted small text only.

### Tests (split per codex 8)
- Backend bead: resolver unit tests (path traversal, size cap, whitelist), tool-call persistence at drain time.
- Page bead: e2e for tab switching + URL deep-link round-trip.
- Evidence bead: e2e for whitelist enforcement, large-file download path, missing-path 404.
- Final bead: spec docs + cross-cutting e2e (full prompt visible, full response visible, tool trace visible, evidence list visible).

## Acceptance Criteria
1. `/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/runs/[runId]` renders tabbed detail: Overview, Prompt, Response, Tools, Evidence, Session.
2. Prompt tab shows full `prompt` body for both `layer=run` and `layer=try`.
3. Response tab shows full `response` (run-layer) or `result.json` body (try-layer) with verdict badge.
4. Tools tab shows paginated tool-call trace for both layers; data sourced from persisted `ToolCallEntry` (not log parsing); `Load more` paginates.
5. Evidence tab lists every file in the run's bundle with size + mimeType; whitelisted small text files (`*.txt`, `*.md`, `manifest.json`, `prompt.md`, `result.json`, <64 KB) render inline as raw text; everything else is download-only.
6. Session tab shows tokens (prompt/completion/total/cached), billingMode, base/result revs, stderr or stderrPath link.
7. Tab state reflected in URL query; refresh restores state.
8. For running runs, Overview shows status + a "View live progress" link to the originating worker page (no new subscription infra in this story).
9. Bundle-file resolver rejects any path outside `<projectRoot>/.ddx/executions/<runId>/` with 404 (canonical-path check; tested with `..`, symlink, absolute paths).
10. Tools and Evidence tabs lazy-load on activation; default page size 50 tool calls; large evidence file (>64 KB) shows size + download button only.
11. FEAT-008 records trust-boundary statement: project membership grants raw transcript visibility; no redaction in v1.

## Risks
- Tool-call persistence at drain may need schema migration on AgentSession — addressed inside backend bead.
- Bundle-file path traversal — explicit test required.
- Story 8 must land 8.0 (data canonicalization) and 8.2 (row-expansion port) first; sequence Story 16 after.

## Bead breakdown (codex-reconciled)

| Bead | Title | Deps | Tier |
|---|---|---|---|
| 16.0 | **Backend: Run detail resolver + normalized tool-call persistence + bundle-file confinement.** Persist `ToolCallEntry` at drain time onto AgentSession/Run detail. Extend `Run` GraphQL with `prompt`, `response`, `stderr`, `toolCalls`, `bundleFiles`, `bundleFile`. Canonical-path bundle-root check. Resolver unit tests (path traversal, size cap, whitelist). | Story 8.0 | smart |
| 16.1 | **Frontend: rebuild `runs/[runId]/+page.svelte` as tabbed Overview/Prompt/Response/Tools/Session page.** Promote shared subcomponents into `lib/runDetail/`. URL-driven tab state. Page e2e (tab switching, deep-link round-trip). | 16.0, Story 8.2 | cheap-then-review |
| 16.2 | **Evidence tab: bundle-file list + metadata + download + whitelist inline raw-text view (≤64 KB, allowed extensions).** Evidence-specific e2e (whitelist enforcement, large-file download, missing-path 404). | 16.0, 16.1 | cheap |
| 16.3 | **Specs + cross-cutting e2e + telemetry.** Update FEAT-008 (run-detail subsection + trust-boundary), FEAT-010 (resolver contract), FEAT-019 (review surface link). End-to-end e2e: full prompt visible, full response visible, tool trace visible, evidence list visible. Audit event for "raw transcript viewed". | 16.1, 16.2 | cheap |

4 beads. (Reduced from 5 by collapsing 16.0+16.1 per codex finding 7.)

## Open questions resolved
- **Live tailing**: out of scope, link-to-worker only.
- **Redaction**: out of scope, trust boundary documented.
- **Permission scope**: equals project artifact access; Story 14 owns any future ACL.
- **AgentSession tool-call source**: persist at drain, not parse logs.

Create a new bead

Usage:
  ddx bead create <title> [flags]

Flags:
      --acceptance string    Acceptance criteria
      --description string   Description
  -h, --help                 help for create
      --labels string        Comma-separated labels
      --parent string        Parent bead ID
      --priority int         Priority (0=highest, 4=lowest) (default 2)
      --set stringArray      Set custom field (key=value, repeatable)
      --type string          Bead type (task, bug, epic, chore)

Global Flags:

      --library-base-path string   override path for DDx library location

input.command:
ddx bead create "Story 16.0: Backend run-detail resolver + tool-call persistence + bundle-file confinement" \
  --type task --priority 2 --parent ddx-a8a18cb7 --labels "phase:2,story:16" \
  --description "Persist normalized ToolCallEntry at drain time onto AgentSession/Run detail backing (extend existing drain in service_run.go / agent_runner_service.go). Extend Run GraphQL resolver with: prompt, response, stderr, toolCalls(first, after), bundleFiles[] (path, size, mimeType), bundleFile(path) -> {content, truncated, sizeBytes}. Bundle-root confinement: canonical-path check rejecting any path outside <projectRoot>/.ddx/executions/<runId>/. Whitelist enforcement for inline content (allowed extensions: *.txt, *.md, manifest.json, prompt.md, result.json; <64KB). Resolver unit tests cover: path traversal (.., symlink, absolute), size cap (>64KB returns truncated=true with sizeBytes), whitelist enforcement, tool-call persistence-at-drain (not log parsing). See /tmp/story-16-final.md." \
  --acceptance "Run resolver exposes prompt/response/stderr/toolCalls(first,after)/bundleFiles[]/bundleFile(path). ToolCallEntry persisted at drain time (not parsed from logs at resolver time). bundleFile rejects path traversal, symlink escape, absolute paths outside bundle root with 404. Files >64KB or non-whitelisted extensions return truncated=true,sizeBytes=N (no content). Unit tests cover all of the above. Existing drain code in service_run.go / agent_runner_service.go updated to write normalized ToolCallEntry to detail backing." 2>&1 | tail -5

ddx bead create "Story 16.1: Frontend rebuild runs/[runId]/+page.svelte as tabbed run-detail page" \
  --type task --priority 2 --parent ddx-a8a18cb7 --labels "phase:2,story:16" \
  --description "Promote shared subcomponents from cli/internal/server/frontend/src/routes/executions/[executionId]/+page.svelte into lib/runDetail/ (tab shell, prompt panel, response panel, tools panel, session panel). Rebuild runs/[runId]/+page.svelte as tabbed: Overview / Prompt / Response / Tools / Session (Evidence tab handled in 16.2). URL-driven tab state via ?tab=<name>; deep-link friendly. Overview: status (running/merged/preserved/failed) with last-update timestamp, run/try/work layer chip, base/result rev, link to originating worker page for running runs (re-use existing workerProgress; no new subscription infra). Tools tab paginated 50/page with Load more. Tools tab lazy-loads on activation. Session tab shows tokens (prompt/completion/total/cached), billingMode, base/result revs, stderr or stderrPath link. Page e2e: tab switching + URL deep-link round-trip. Depends on 16.0 (resolver) and Story 8.2 (row-expansion port)." \
  --acceptance "/nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/runs/[runId] renders tabbed: Overview/Prompt/Response/Tools/Session. Prompt tab shows full prompt body for both layer=run and layer=try. Response tab shows full response (run-layer) or result.json body (try-layer) with verdict badge. Tools tab paginates 50/page from persisted ToolCallEntry; Load more works. Session tab shows tokens/billingMode/revs/stderr. Tab state in ?tab= URL query; refresh restores. Running runs show status + 'View live progress' link to worker page. Tools tab lazy-loads. Shared subcomponents extracted to lib/runDetail/ and reused by /executions/[id] page. Page e2e covers tab switching + deep-link round-trip." 2>&1 | tail -5

ddx bead create "Story 16.2: Evidence tab — bundle-file list + download + whitelist inline view" \
  --type task --priority 2 --parent ddx-a8a18cb7 --labels "phase:2,story:16" \
  --description "Add Evidence tab to runs/[runId]/+page.svelte. Lists every file in run's bundle with path, size, mimeType. Whitelisted small text files (*.txt, *.md, manifest.json, prompt.md, result.json, <64KB) render inline as raw text. Everything else: download link only (no Markdown rendering, no syntax highlighting, no hex preview). Evidence tab lazy-loads on activation. Large files (>64KB) show size + download button only. Evidence-specific e2e: whitelist enforcement (small whitelisted file inlines, large file download-only, non-whitelisted extension download-only), large-file download path, missing-path 404. Depends on 16.0 (bundleFile resolver) and 16.1 (page shell)." \
  --acceptance "Evidence tab lists every file in run's bundle with size + mimeType. Whitelisted text files <64KB render inline as raw text; non-whitelisted or >64KB files show download link only. Evidence tab lazy-loads. e2e covers: whitelist enforcement, large-file download, missing-path 404. p95 dataset (30 evidence files) renders without crash." 2>&1 | tail -5

ddx bead create "Story 16.3: Specs + cross-cutting e2e + raw-transcript-viewed audit event" \
  --type task --priority 2 --parent ddx-a8a18cb7 --labels "phase:2,story:16" \
  --description "Spec updates: FEAT-008 — add Run-detail-page subsection; document trust boundary statement ('Anyone with project read access sees raw prompts, responses, stderr, tool args. Operators must not store production secrets in repos consumed by DDx agents'); document evidence browser whitelist (allowed extensions + 64KB cap). FEAT-010 — extend Run resolver contract to include prompt, response, stderr, toolCalls(first, after), bundleFiles[], bundleFile(path) with bundle-root confinement; document normalized ToolCallEntry as canonical store populated at drain. FEAT-019 — review surface points to /runs/[runId] deep page. Cross-cutting e2e: full prompt visible, full response visible, tool trace visible, evidence list visible — exercising the entire stack from drain through resolver through page render. Audit event for 'raw transcript viewed' (project-membership trust boundary documented; this audit is the only enforcement surface in v1). Depends on 16.1, 16.2." \
  --acceptance "FEAT-008 updated with run-detail subsection + trust-boundary statement + evidence whitelist. FEAT-010 updated with extended Run resolver contract + drain-time persistence note. FEAT-019 updated with link to /runs/[runId] from review surface. Cross-cutting e2e exercises full prompt/response/tool-trace/evidence-list end-to-end. 'Raw transcript viewed' audit event emitted on access and covered by test. p95 dataset (200 tool calls, 30 evidence files) tab regression e2e verifies all tabs render and become interactive within one render frame." 2>&1 | tail -5

input.command: ddx bead update ddx-a8a18cb7 --notes "decomposed into ddx-6d132f62 (16.0 backend resolver+persistence), ddx-f04faa86 (16.1 page shell), ddx-4cd64068 (16.2 evidence tab), ddx-70a432b5 (16.3 specs+cross-cutting e2e+audit). Edges: 16.1->16.0, 16.2->16.0+16.1, 16.3->16.1+16.2. Plan at /tmp/story-16-final.md." 2>&1 | tail -3

input.content:
Bead ddx-a8a18cb7 ("Story 16: expose server task session logs for review") is a sub-epic
whose acceptance is "All child beads closed." The plan at /tmp/story-16-final.md prescribes a
4-bead breakdown spanning a backend resolver+persistence change, a frontend tabbed-page
rewrite, an evidence tab with whitelist enforcement, and spec updates plus cross-cutting e2e.
This exceeds Step 0 size limits (multiple subsystems, mixed backend/frontend/spec/test
deliverables, AC explicitly enumerated as separate feature-sized pieces), so this attempt
performs decomposition only — no implementation.

Children created (all parented to ddx-a8a18cb7, labels phase:2,story:16):

- ddx-6d132f62 — Story 16.0: Backend run-detail resolver + tool-call persistence + bundle-file confinement.
  Slice: Persist normalized ToolCallEntry at drain time; extend Run GraphQL with
  prompt/response/stderr/toolCalls/bundleFiles/bundleFile; canonical-path bundle-root
  confinement; resolver unit tests (path traversal, size cap, whitelist).

- ddx-f04faa86 — Story 16.1: Frontend rebuild runs/[runId]/+page.svelte as tabbed run-detail page.
  Slice: Promote shared subcomponents into lib/runDetail/; rebuild page as tabbed
  Overview/Prompt/Response/Tools/Session with URL-driven tab state; Tools tab pagination;
  link to worker page for running runs; page e2e for tab switching + deep-link round-trip.
  Depends on 16.0.

- ddx-4cd64068 — Story 16.2: Evidence tab — bundle-file list + download + whitelist inline view.
  Slice: Evidence tab UI; whitelist enforcement (allowed exts, <64KB inline); large-file
  download-only path; e2e for whitelist + missing-path 404. Depends on 16.0 and 16.1.

- ddx-70a432b5 — Story 16.3: Specs + cross-cutting e2e + raw-transcript-viewed audit event.
  Slice: FEAT-008 (run-detail subsection + trust boundary + whitelist), FEAT-010 (resolver
  contract + drain-time persistence), FEAT-019 (review surface link); cross-cutting e2e for
  full prompt/response/tool-trace/evidence-list; raw-transcript-viewed audit event.
  Depends on 16.1 and 16.2.

Dependency edges added: 16.1->16.0, 16.2->16.0, 16.2->16.1, 16.3->16.1, 16.3->16.2.

Parent bead annotated via `ddx bead update --notes` recording the child IDs and edges.

Rationale for decomposition rather than implementation in a single attempt: the AC of the
parent epic is structurally a roll-up over child closure, and a single attempt at all four
slices would mix Go resolver work, schema/persistence at drain time, SvelteKit page rewrite,
evidence-browser UI with whitelist, three spec doc edits, and cross-cutting e2e — well past
~6 ACs and ~5 unrelated packages. Each child is independently sized for one execute-bead
attempt and can be queued in dependency order.

- ddx-6d132f62 16.0 backend resolver + tool-call persistence + confinement
- ddx-f04faa86 16.1 frontend tabbed run-detail page
- ddx-4cd64068 16.2 evidence tab w/ whitelist
- ddx-70a432b5 16.3 specs + cross-cutting e2e + audit event" 2>&1 | tail -8

data.text:
Decomposed Story 16 epic into 4 child beads per the plan at `/tmp/story-16-final.md` rather than attempting implementation:

- `ddx-6d132f62` 16.0 — backend resolver + tool-call persistence at drain + bundle-file confinement
- `ddx-f04faa86` 16.1 — tabbed `runs/[runId]` page (depends on 16.0)
- `ddx-4cd64068` 16.2 — evidence tab w/ whitelist (depends on 16.0, 16.1)
- `ddx-70a432b5` 16.3 — FEAT-008/010/019 specs + cross-cutting e2e + raw-transcript audit (depends on 16.1, 16.2)

Parent annotated with child IDs/edges. Rationale committed to `.ddx/executions/20260502T121506-6a466f9b/no_changes_rationale.txt`.
